summary: Comprehensive frontend-only testing of the ReverbCode (Agent Orchestrator) static landing page across desktop (1440), tablet (1024) and mobile (390) viewports. All requested sections render correctly with the right data-testid hooks, navigation smooth-scrolls to anchors, live demo tabs switch the code block, mobile nav toggle opens a menu with all 5 links, marquee animates, and there are no console errors or page errors.

issues: scroll-behavior on <html> is 'auto' (not 'smooth'). Anchor navigation still works (jump scroll) but does not animate. Consider adding scroll-behavior: smooth in index.css for nicer UX.
Nav 'Docs' link currently points at the GitHub README (#readme), which is fine for a static page but a real /docs route or dedicated docs.md anchor would be cleaner for a launch.

action_items: Optional polish: add `html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }` so the anchor nav animates instead of jumping.
Optional: surface aria-current on the active nav link if you ever add scroll-spy.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js routes only '/'. If someone deep-links to /anything-else they get a blank page. Add a catch-all <Route path='*' element={<Navigate to='/' />}/> or a 404 component.
All external GitHub links use target='_blank' and rel='noreferrer' which is good; hero-secondary-cta and footer-github-link consistently follow the same pattern.
LiveDemo copy button silently swallows clipboard errors (catch { /* noop */ }). For a public landing page this is acceptable, but a brief tooltip 'Copy failed' would be friendlier.
No 'Skip to content' link / a11y landmark beyond <main>. Minor a11y polish for a public marketing site.
No favicon / OG meta verified (out of scope for testing here).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified test ids and behaviors: site-nav, hero-section/hero-primary-cta (https://github.com/AgentWrapper/agent-orchestrator, target=_blank)/hero-secondary-cta (docs/architecture.md)/hero-terminal, agents-marquee (CSS animation 'scroll' 65s, contains Claude/Codex/Cursor/Aider/OpenCode), features-grid (7 h3 titles incl '23+ agent adapters'), how-it-works (4 numbered steps 01-04), architecture-diagram (Go daemon center + 6 ports Agent/Runtime/Workspace/SCM/Tracker/Reviewer + ao CLI + Electron App clients), live-demo-terminal with demo-tab-install/spawn/ci all swap demo-code-block content, demo-copy-btn clickable, social-proof shows 7.7k/1.1k/44+ and 4 testimonials, cta-section with cta-github-btn and cta-docs-btn, footer with footer-github-link, nav-mobile-toggle works at 390px and reveals 5 nav links. No console errors. No backend involved.
